name: pure_cublas_three_sgemm_3sgemm_style
strategy: Replace ATen mm/add path with a minimal /workspace/lora/3_sgemm.cu-style direct cuBLAS sequence, avoid B.T materialization and input copies, and accumulate the rank-16 term into Y via SGEMM beta=1; should reduce launch/framework overhead while preserving cuBLAS performance for W @ X.
